assertions: D12: Mobile responsive layout renders properly at 360 width with no horizontal overflow.

vision_verdict: pass. The landing page is fully responsive at 360px width. The layout maintains perfect alignment within the viewport boundaries without any horizontal displacement. The content, including the header "Fahem Educational Platform" and the informational notice regarding mobile compatibility, is rendered cleanly with proper text wrapping. The design effectively utilizes the available screen space to present a clear, readable message, ensuring that the user is informed about the optimal viewing requirements in a professional and accessible format.
